name: spm-codex
description: Connect Codex to Structured Project Memory through the hosted SPM MCP endpoint.

interface.shortDescription: Automatic, multi-project memory for Codex through SPM.
interface.longDescription: SPM for Codex maintains durable project memory throughout the Codex task lifecycle. Hooks submit user and assistant turns to LLM-first memory triage with automatic provenance, while the hosted MCP endpoint provides temporal state, context packs, context boundaries, graph query, active-project resolution, explicit cross-project composition, trust status, preflight and post-action reports. Browser-approved tokens can be limited to one project or authorized organization projects; each conversation keeps one active project and never mixes another project unless the user explicitly requests it.
defaultPrompt: Work on this project with its durable memory, constraints, risks and decisions in scope.
Use authorized cross-project context only if I explicitly ask for it.
Review this change against temporal memory, authority, tests and release risk.
